Name: Storage Reader-Only
Description: Read-only access to storage account metadata and blob container contents. No write, delete, or key-management access. Models an auditor, reporting tool, or read-only integration that needs visibility without any ability to modify data.
_notes: Replace <YOUR_SUBSCRIPTION_ID> with your actual subscription ID before deploying. DataActions (blob read) are separate from control-plane Actions (metadata read) in Azure RBAC - this role intentionally includes only the data-plane read action, not listkeys/action or any write/delete, so a holder of this role can read blob contents but never obtain the storage account access keys.
